description: A content writer accidentally overwrote parts of the published blog post 'Annual Marketing Strategy Report' with draft notes. In the WordPress admin panel, restore the previous correct version of the post that contains the complete 'Q2 Goals' section (mentioning expansion into Southeast Asia, Eastern Europe, and South America) and the 'Budget Allocation' section (mentioning $2.4 million). Ensure the restored post is published and no longer contains 'DRAFT NOTES' or 'TODO' placeholders.
